assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns 0 for an empty array
assertionResults.title: returns 0 for an empty array

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns 0 for an array with only negative numbers
assertionResults.title: returns 0 for an array with only negative numbers

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns 0 for an array with only zeros
assertionResults.title: returns 0 for an array with only zeros

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns the value for a single positive number
assertionResults.title: returns the value for a single positive number

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns 0 for a single negative number
assertionResults.title: returns 0 for a single negative number

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum returns the sum of the whole array when all numbers are positive
assertionResults.title: returns the sum of the whole array when all numbers are positive

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum computes the maximum sublist sum for mixed positive and negative numbers
assertionResults.title: computes the maximum sublist sum for mixed positive and negative numbers

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum resets the running sum after it becomes negative
assertionResults.title: resets the running sum after it becomes negative

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum handles the best sublist at the beginning of the array
assertionResults.title: handles the best sublist at the beginning of the array

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum handles the best sublist at the end of the array
assertionResults.title: handles the best sublist at the end of the array

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum handles the best sublist in the middle of the array
assertionResults.title: handles the best sublist in the middle of the array

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum handles zeros mixed with positive and negative numbers
assertionResults.title: handles zeros mixed with positive and negative numbers

assertionResults.fullName: max_sublist_sum does not mutate the original array
assertionResults.title: does not mutate the original array
